# @nordic/fs-cache

Nordic file system server cache.

## ✋ Internal Package

> [!WARNING]
>
> This is an **internal package** to the [Nordic monorepo](https://github.com/melisource/fury_nordic) ✋. You likely don't need to use it directly.

## Description

The `@nordic/fs-cache` module provides caching for static assets, webpack manifests, file content, and source map processing in Nordic applications. It manages in-memory storage of frequently accessed resources with a 10MB memory limit and includes source map resolution for debugging purposes.

## API

### assetsCache

Singleton instance that manages asset caching. Must be initialised once with `assetsCache.initialize()`.

#### assetsCache - Properties

| Property             | Type                       | Description                            |
| -------------------- | -------------------------- | -------------------------------------- |
| `manifest`           | `Map<string, string>`      | Asset names to generated files mapping |
| `mainAssetsManifest` | `Map<string, object>`      | Main assets manifest for entry points  |
| `serializedManifest` | `string`                   | Serialized manifest for client use     |
| `loadableStats`      | `Readonly<object> \| null` | Loadable-components statistics         |

#### assetsCache - Methods

| Method                                     | Parameters         | Return                | Description                                  |
| ------------------------------------------ | ------------------ | --------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `initialize()`                             |                    | `void`                | Initialises cache and loads manifests        |
| `getAssetContent(assetName, isSmartPOS?)`  | `string, boolean?` | `string \| null`      | Gets cached asset content                    |
| `getMainScripts(mainEntry)`                | `MainEntry`        | `Set<string>`         | Gets script URLs for entry point             |
| `getMainStyles(mainEntry)`                 | `MainEntry`        | `Set<string>`         | Gets style URLs for entry point              |
| `getMainScriptsNames(mainEntry)`           | `MainEntry`        | `Set<string>`         | Gets script names for entry point            |
| `getMainStylesNames(mainEntry)`            | `MainEntry`        | `Set<string>`         | Gets style names for entry point             |
| `getSerializedMainScriptsNames(mainEntry)` | `string`           | `string \| undefined` | Gets serialized script names for entry point |
| `getSerializedMainStylesNames(mainEntry)`  | `string`           | `string \| undefined` | Gets serialized style names for entry point  |

Where `MainEntry` can be a `string`, `string[]`, or `Set<string>`.

#### assetsCache - Example

```ts
import { assetsCache } from '@nordic/fs-cache';

// Initialize the cache (must be called once at startup)
assetsCache.initialize();

// Get asset content for inline build assets
const cssContent = assetsCache.getAssetContent('main.css');
const jsContent = assetsCache.getAssetContent('bundle.js');

// Get main scripts and styles for a page entry
const mainScripts = assetsCache.getMainScripts(['home-page', 'some-chunk']);
const mainStyles = assetsCache.getMainStyles('home-page');

console.log('Manifest size:', assetsCache.manifest.size);

// Get serialized asset names for client-side use
const serializedScripts =
  assetsCache.getSerializedMainScriptsNames('home-page');
const serializedStyles = assetsCache.getSerializedMainStylesNames('home-page');
```

### sourceMapCache

Singleton instance that manages source map caching and resolution for debugging purposes.

#### sourceMapCache - Methods

| Method                                      | Parameters                 | Return                    | Description                                               |
| ------------------------------------------- | -------------------------- | ------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| `getCodePositionPath(file, line?, column?)` | `string, string?, string?` | `Promise<string \| null>` | Resolves original source code position from compiled file |

> [!NOTE]
>
> The `sourceMapCache` processes source maps from both build files and node_modules dependencies. It maintains an internal cache for node_modules source maps to optimize performance.

#### sourceMapCache - Example

```ts
import { sourceMapCache } from '@nordic/fs-cache';

// Resolve original position from compiled file
const position = await sourceMapCache.getCodePositionPath(
  'main.js',
  '15',
  '10',
);
// Returns: "source:line:column" format or null if not found
```

## Development mode

In development, asset content from `getAssetContent()` is not cached (except for node_modules dependencies) to allow hot-reloading of application files.

When `getAssetContent()` cannot read asset content, it throws `NordicAssetNotFoundError` in development but returns `null` silently in production.

## Limitations

### Memory limits

The cache is limited to 10MB to prevent excessive memory consumption.
